name: fulcrum
description: AI-centric inventory management and marketplace management.

scripts.test:backend: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --build db-test backend && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec -T backend python -m pytest -c pytest.ini && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:all: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.docs:build: uv venv ./.venv --seed && uv pip install -r docs/requirements.txt --python ./.venv/bin/python && ./.venv/bin/sphinx-build -E docs/ docs/_build/html
scripts.docs:serve:
# Make sure you have uv installed (see docs/getting-started/backend-setup.md)
    uv venv ./.venv --seed && uv pip install -r docs/requirements.txt --python ./.venv/bin/python && ./.venv/bin/sphinx-autobuild -E docs/ docs/_build/html --port 8001 --open-browser
